steps.title: Clear the multiplier
steps.content:
Start with the given equation and clear the fraction.
$$
ak=\frac{b}{15}(6+m)
$$
Multiply both sides by $\frac{15}{b}$.
$$
\frac{15ak}{b}=6+m
$$

steps.title: Isolate the variable
steps.content: Subtract $6$ from both sides. $$ m=\frac{15ak}{b}-6 $$ The answer is D.
